cards.title: Policy Document Structure
cards.content:
ΓÇó Schedule: Contains specific details (Name, Sum Assured, Premium, Nominee).
ΓÇó Standard Provisions: General rules applicable to all policies.
ΓÇó Specific Provisions: Special conditions like extra premium for hazardous hobbies.

cards.title: Grace Period & Lapsation
cards.content:
ΓÇó Grace Period: Extra time to pay premium without penalty (15 days for monthly, 30 days for others).
ΓÇó Lapse: If premium isn't paid within the grace period, the policy lapses (risk cover stops).

items.text: Ordinary Revival: Pay all arrears of premium + interest within the revival period.
Special Revival: Policy date is shifted to reduce arrears (can be done only once).
Loan Revival: Arrears are recovered from a new loan taken against the policy.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: During the Grace Period, if the insured dies, the claim IS PAYABLE, but the unpaid premium is deducted.
Revival requires proof of continued good health (Declaration of Good Health or Medical report).
Endorsement: Any modification or change made to the policy after it is issued.
A lapsed policy has zero risk cover until it is officially revived by the insurer.
Warranties are strict conditions in the policy that must be fully complied with.
